children.heading: Nonduplication
children.label: a Nonduplication
children.text: The Secretary shall ensure that facilities constructed using financial assistance provided under this chapter do not duplicate adequate established telemedicine services or distance learning services.

children.heading: Loan maturity
children.label: b Loan maturity
children.text: The maturities of cost of money loans shall be determined by the Secretary, based on the useful life of the facility being financed, except that the loan shall not be for a period of more than 10 years.

children.heading: Loan security and feasibility
children.label: c Loan security and feasibility
children.text: The Secretary shall make a cost of money loan only if the Secretary determines that the security for the loan is reasonably adequate and that the loan will be repaid within the period of the loan.

children.heading: Encouraging consortia
children.label: d Encouraging consortia
children.text: The Secretary shall encourage the development of consortia to provide telemedicine services or distance learning services through telecommunications in rural areas served by a telecommunications provider.

children.heading: Coordination with other agencies
children.label: e Coordination with other agencies
children.text: The Secretary shall coordinate, to the extent practicable, with other Federal and State agencies with similar grant or loan programs to pool resources for funding meritorious proposals in rural areas.

children.heading: Informational efforts
children.label: f Informational efforts
children.text: The Secretary shall establish and implement procedures to carry out informational efforts to advise potential end users located in rural areas of each State about the program authorized by this chapter.
